docket_entries.description: STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE EXECUTED BY COUNSEL FOR BOTH PARTIES

CONTINUED FROM 2-15 TO 03-08 ON OSC RE CONTEMPT, APP FOR INCREASE IN C/S AND AWARD OF ATTY FEES, CALENDAR MOTION: OSC - CONTEMPT, CALENDAR MOTION: MODIFICATION CHILD SUPPORT, CALENDAR MOTION: INJUNCTIVE ORDER HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-1990 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 12
TRANSFER RECEIPT - SAN MATEO CTY SUP CT / NO. 354973
HR HELD. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT WITH COUNSEL. CRT ORDERED: 1) RESP TO PAY ADD'N ATTY FEES OF $3,500 IF SUPP BY DECL
2) RESP FURN PROOF OF 3 JOB APPL EA/MO MAR/AP/MAY 3) RESP TO SERVE I/E DECL ON OPPOSING PARTY BY MAY 10
4) RESP TO PAY C/S $300/MO RETROACTIVE TO 9-1-89 5) RESP TO PAY C/S $250/MO + C/C $254/MO RETRO TO 3-1-90
ON MAR PAYMNT. PAYMENT ON FEES AT $50 MO KICKED UP WHENPREVIOUS ORD EXP. (TOTAL TO BE $250) NO CONT DATE (SC12)
BASED ON RESP ABILITY EARN 3000/M0 & PET GROSS 283/MO 7) ARREARAGE DET $200; TO BE PAID 3-1 + BALANCE $354 DUE
STIPULATION FOR REMOVAL OF ACTION & ORDER
SEE REGISTER OF ACTION (BOOK) FOR ALL DOCUMENTS FILED PRIOR TO 03-08-90
TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT
